calendar.matters:
Account And Petition To Settle Account
Off Calendar Jul-24-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gerald Woods for Petitioner/Trustee.
Gary Rothstein for Kim Olson (Beneficiary/Objector).

Mr. Woods stated that this is the place where the Trust is being administered, that the Trustee has written checks, sold property and is entering into contracts, that an accounting has been filed, that objections were filed and that he has responded to the objections. The Court noted that Trustee is doing all of this in Fresno and stated that Fresno has jurisdiction. The Account and Petition to Settle Account is off calendar. The Parties will file in Fresno.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
